created.description: Timestamp when the JSON Web Key was created

e.description: RSA key value (exponent) for key binding

id.description: The unique ID of the JSON Web Key

kid.description: Unique identifier of the JSON Web Key in the Custom Authorization Server's Public JWKS

kty.description: Cryptographic algorithm family for the certificate's key pair

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the JSON Web Key was updated

n.description: RSA key value (modulus) for key binding

status.description: The status of the encryption key. You can use only an `ACTIVE` key to encrypt tokens issued by the authorization server.

use.description: Acceptable use of the JSON Web Key

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available for the current status of a JSON Web Key using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
